item.description: The complete analysis of Vietnamese Stealer a Python-based info stealer using Telegram as a C2.

item.title: AtomicStealer Spreading via Fake Apple Support Websites
item.description: Uncovering AtomicStealer campaign using a fake Apple Support website designed to trick users into running a malicious bash command, infecting their machine.

item.title: The $5 Million Letter: When Physical Mail Becomes Digital Extortion
item.description: How sophisticated criminals are using old-school tactics and psychological warfare to extort businesses without ever touching their systems

item.title: New Attack Vector - AI - Induced Destruction
item.description: How "helpful" AI assistants are accidentally destroying production systems - and what we're doing about it.

item.title: From Drone Strike to File Recovery: Outsmarting a Nation State
item.description: Walk through our investigation workflow, cryptographic analysis, and end-to-end data-recovery strategy, proving that "encrypted" doesn't mean unrecoverable

item.title: The Blurring Lines Between Financially Motivated Attacks and Nation-State Cyber Operations
item.description: This approach of profit-driven attacks with state-endorsed hacking presents a dual threat scenario, unlike anything seen in the past.

item.title: Live Forensic Collection from Ivanti EPMM Appliances (CVE-2025-4427 & CVE-2025-4428)
item.description: Two newly discovered vulnerabilities (CVE-2025-4427 CVE-2025-4428) in Ivanti Endpoint Mobile Manager are being actively exploited leading to severe data breach

item.title: Unmasking a Sophisticated Phishing Campaign: Profero IRT’s Deep Dive into a Global Microsoft Identity Attack
item.description: Forensic investigation into a global phishing campaign targeting Microsoft 365 identities, specifically Azure Active Directory and Office 365 accounts.
